title: U.S. hits dozens of Iranian targets as Trump threatens power plants and bridges
summary_full: The president’s threats of further military strikes underscored his rising frustration over the collapse of a preliminary truce agreement and Tehran’s refusal to bow to American demands.
summary_public: The president’s threats of further military strikes underscored his rising frustration over the collapse of a preliminary truce agreement and Tehran’s refusal to bow to American demands.

IR.label: negative
